scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web,camera -c blue,green,magenta npm:dev:server npm:dev:web npm:dev:camera
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web && npm run build -w camera
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web && npm run typecheck -w camera
